meanings.usage: 用于表示时间，等于15分钟
表示与朋友见面或约会
用于建筑物或房间的入口
a quarter past eleven表示11点一刻
表示必要性，否定形式mustn't表示禁止

phrases.phrase: What are you going to do?
phrases.usage: 用于询问某人打算做什么

examples.en: What are you going to do this evening?
What are you going to do tomorrow?
Can I have the key to the front door, please?
examples.zh: 请问我能拿前门的钥匙吗？

examples.en: Can I have some water?

phrases.usage: 用于把东西递给对方时

examples.en: Here you are. Take it.
Here you are. Enjoy your meal.
Enjoy yourself at the party!
We always enjoy ourselves, Mum.
examples.zh: 我们总是玩得很开心，妈妈。

phrases.usage: 用于回应别人的感谢，表示不客气

examples.en: Thanks, Mum. That's all right.
Thank you very much! That's all right.

phrases.usage: 用于表示禁止或不允许

examples.en: You mustn't come home late.
You mustn't be late for school.
She always comes home early.
What time do you come home?
You must be home at half past ten.
examples.zh: 你必须在十点半之前到家。

examples.en: I will be home at six.
You must be home at half past ten.
examples.zh: 你必须在十点半之前到家。

examples.en: The meeting starts at half past ten.
You mustn't come home after a quarter past eleven.
examples.zh: 你不能在十一点一刻之后回家。

examples.en: The train leaves at a quarter past eleven.

grammar.title: must和mustn't的用法
grammar.definition: must表示必须、应当；mustn't表示禁止、不允许
grammar.structure: 主语 + must/mustn't + 动词原形
grammar.usage: must用于表达义务或必要性；mustn't用于表达禁止或不允许做的事情

examples.en: You must be home at half past ten.
examples.zh: 你必须在十点半之前到家。

examples.en: You mustn't come home late.
You mustn't come home after a quarter past eleven.
examples.zh: 你不能在十一点一刻之后回家。

grammar.title: Can I have...? 表示请求
grammar.definition: 用can引导的一般疑问句来礼貌地请求某物
grammar.usage: 用于向他人请求某物的礼貌表达方式

examples.en: Can I have the key to the front door, please?
examples.zh: 请问我能拿前门的钥匙吗？

examples.en: Can I have a cup of tea?
Can I have your name?

grammar.title: What are you going to do? 将来时
grammar.definition: be going to表示计划或打算要做的事
grammar.structure: What + are + 主语 + going to + do?
grammar.usage: 用于询问某人打算或计划做什么

examples.en: What are you going to do this evening, Jill?
What are you going to do this weekend?
examples.zh: 这个周末你打算做什么？

examples.en: I'm going to meet some friends.

sentencePatterns.pattern: What are you going to do + 时间/地点?

original.en: What are you going to do this evening, Jill?

imitations.en: What are you going to do tomorrow?
What are you going to do this weekend?
imitations.zh: 这个周末你打算做什么？

imitations.en: What are you going to do after school?

sentencePatterns.pattern: Can I have the + 名词 + to + 地点?

original.en: Can I have the key to the front door, please?
original.zh: 请问我能拿前门的钥匙吗？

imitations.en: Can I have the key to the back door?
imitations.zh: 请问我能拿后门的钥匙吗？

imitations.en: Can I have the key to your room?
imitations.zh: 请问我能拿你房间的钥匙吗？

imitations.en: Can I have the book on the table?
imitations.zh: 我能拿桌上的那本书吗？

original.en: You must be home at half past ten.
original.zh: 你必须在十点半之前到家。

imitations.en: You must finish your homework first.
You mustn't be late for school.
Here you are. Take this book.
Here you are. The key you wanted.
Here you are. Enjoy your meal.
